privileged_info_summary: The hydration goal tracker task uses synthetic water intake data spanning 14 consecutive days (2024-01-01 to 2024-01-14). Daily intake is recorded in three time periods (morning, afternoon, evening). The task requires students to create formulas: SUM formulas to total daily intake, IF formulas to check if the 64 oz daily goal is met, AVERAGE to compute mean daily intake (correct value: 62.14 oz/day, not the claimed ~61.7 oz/day), and COUNTIF to count days meeting the goal (8 out of 14 days). The dataset contains properly balanced data with 8 days meeting the 64 oz threshold and 6 days falling short.
